offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, unexpected subscription charges cause cash flow gaps. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing recurring subscription expenses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers posts about subscription management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try subscription alerts and expense tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
